workflow_runs.title: Implement issue 9 skills-first slash workflow surface
workflow_runs.next_action: Ask what exact proof format should appear before context-aware grilling starts.
workflow_runs.decision: Do not rely on Codex's generic understanding of agentic workflow terms. If the reported issue mentions loops, gates, lanes, evals, handoff, human boundary, source evidence, or another ECC concept, load the relevant ECC repo docs/skills/plans first and cite them in the context manifest/premise lock before grilling.
